CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2016 Off Calendar

Motion & Notice Of Hearing (W/First Appearance Fee)
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vivian Lerche telephone number 415-680-5731 specially appearing for Plaintiff Capital One Bank.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK'S Motion for Entry of Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. Order and a separate judgment signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2016 Continued To Jun-07-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Jill Bates-Moore, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. The CRC 3.1385 Order to Show Cause is re-set to Jun-07-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk RWoods. Proceedings not reported. (610)
